use std::collections::HashSet;

fn find_matching_orders(
    allowed_ids: &[u64],
    orders: &[Order],
) -> Vec<&Order> {
    // GOOD: build HashSet once per batch
    let allowed_set: HashSet<u64> = allowed_ids.iter().copied().collect();
    orders
        .iter()
        .filter(|o| allowed_set.contains(&o.product_id))
        .collect()
}

struct Order {
    id: u64,
    product_id: u64,
    quantity: u32,
}
